library.description: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3: النوافذ، الإدخال، الأحداث، الصوت، والرسم الأساسي.

kind.description: أنواع مجردة أو صريحة تحمل معنى دلالياً وتظهر في التواقيع والبنى.

identity.name: SDL_HapticDirection
identity.titleArabic: Structure that represents a haptic direction

summary.actualTranslationArabic: Structure that represents a haptic direction
summary.actualMeaningArabic: يمثل هذا النوع نوع SDL Haptic Direction، أي القيمة أو المقبض أو المؤشر الذي تتعامل معه بقية الواجهة في هذا السياق.
summary.purposeArabic: يستخدم هذا النوع عندما تحتاج القيمة أو المقبض أو المؤشر الذي يمثله داخل بقية الواجهة.
summary.whyUseArabic: القيمة الحقيقية هنا أنه يمثل نوع القيمة التي تتداولها بقية الواجهة بين الحقول والدوال.
summary.carriedValueArabic: يحمل هذا النوع القيمة الفعلية أو المقبض أو المؤشر الذي تمرره بقية الدوال والحقول في هذا المسار.
summary.sourceDescription: Structure that represents a haptic direction.

remarks:
This is the direction where the force comes from, instead of the
direction in which the force is exerted.

Cardinal directions of the haptic device are relative to the
positioning of the device. North is considered to be away from the
user.
The following diagram represents the cardinal directions:

.--.
 |__| .-------.
 |=.| |.-----.|
 |--| || ||
 | | |'-----'|
 |__|~')_____('
 [ COMPUTER ]

 North (0,-1)
 ^
 |
 |
 (-1,0) West <----[ HAPTIC ]----> East (1,0)
 |
 |
 v
 South (0,1)

 [ USER ]
 \|||/
 (o o)
 ---ooO-(_)-Ooo---
 If type is SDL_HAPTIC_POLAR ,
direction is encoded by hundredths of a degree starting north and
turning clockwise. SDL_HAPTIC_POLAR
only uses the first dir parameter. The cardinal directions
would be:

If type is SDL_HAPTIC_CARTESIAN , direction is
encoded by three positions (X axis, Y axis and Z axis (with 3 axes)). SDL_HAPTIC_CARTESIAN uses the first
three dir parameters. The cardinal directions would be:

The Z axis represents the height of the effect if supported,
otherwise it's unused. In cartesian encoding (1, 2) would be the same as
(2, 4), you can use any multiple you want, only the direction
matters.

If type is SDL_HAPTIC_SPHERICAL , direction is
encoded by two rotations. The first two dir parameters are
used. The dir parameters are as follows (all values are in
hundredths of degrees):
Degrees towards (0, 0, 1) (device needs at least 3 axes).

Example of force coming from the south with all encodings (force
coming from the south means the user will have to pull the stick to
counteract):
